productName: Pure Prana Pulse AIO Disposable Vape - Lemon Tree Live Resin
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Lemon Tree oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of lemon, citrus, and diesel, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
